title: perrottetia alpestris subsp. moluccana
intro: Perrottetia alpestris subsp. moluccana is a subspecies of the Perrottetia alpestris plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Perrottetiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against infections, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Herbal preparations of Perrottetia alpestris subsp. moluccana, such as infusions and tinctures, have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
